subsystem_boundary: HyperLogLog command dispatch and LiveConfig-backed HLL sparse promotion only; PFADD remains on the normal command path, PFCOUNT/PFMERGE representation was not rewritten, and reference sources/oracles were not changed.
changes: Added LiveConfig storage/readback for hll-sparse-max-bytes and wired CONFIG SET/GET to it.
Made PFADD read the sparse-to-dense promotion threshold from CommandContext live config.
Registered PFSELFTEST in the shared dispatcher, including handler-side arity, and implemented the upstream-shaped dense register and approximation self-test using the existing HLL representation.
Recorded focused HLL frontier telemetry in the TCL conformance docs.

gate_results.name: pre_patch_focused_tcl_hll_reproduction
gate_results.summary: Reproduced unit/hyperloglog at 23 passed, 3 failed: PFSELFTEST unknown, and hll-sparse-max-bytes sparse-to-dense promotion stayed sparse.
